summary: Recon established initial authorized visibility in 10.20.0.0/24 from existing stage evidence. Nmap scan evidenced 6 live hosts: 10.20.0.1, 10.20.0.2, 10.20.0.3, 10.20.0.10, 10.20.0.11, 10.20.0.50. Open services discovered: 10.20.0.1:111/tcp rpcbind 2-4 (RPC #100000); 10.20.0.3:8000/tcp HTTP/Uvicorn; 10.20.0.10:8080/tcp HTTP/Jetty 9.2.11.v20150529; 10.20.0.11:80/tcp HTTP/Apache httpd 2.4.25 ((Debian)); 10.20.0.50:2222/tcp SSH/OpenSSH 10.2. Negative evidence: 10.20.0.2 was up but all 1000 scanned TCP ports were closed/reset; 10.20.0.1 had 8000/tcp filtered. This satisfies the success criteria by identifying multiple authorized live hosts and reachable services with evidenced metadata.

metadata.input_summary: arguments: no_dns, operation_id, service_detection, skip_ping, target, timeout_seconds, trace_id
